androidx.preference.Preference.android:summary: To realize autostart install app 'AppSwitcher Starter' and set it as navigation app in your head units settings
androidx.preference.Preference.android:title: Start AppSwitcher Service

androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:summary: If enabled apps and activities are sorted by last usage. Switch between media and navigation app is possible by one key press
androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:title: Smart list

androidx.preference.Preference.android:summary: If 'Smart list' is disabled you can order apps and activities manually
androidx.preference.Preference.android:title: Set order of apps

EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage: AppSwitcher will listen to Android log considering entries with the tag set below
EditTextPreference.android:title: Log tag

EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage: AppSwitcher will listen to Android log entries containing the text below
EditTextPreference.android:title: On button press log entry

EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage: AppSwitcher will listen to Android log entries containing the text below
EditTextPreference.android:dialogTitle: Log entry after short button press
EditTextPreference.android:title: Short button press log entry

EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage: AppSwitcher will listen to Android log entries containing the text below
EditTextPreference.android:dialogTitle: Log entry after long button press
EditTextPreference.android:title: Long button press log entry

androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:summary: Run media app on service start
androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:title: Run media app

androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:summary: Start media app twice to fix issue media app stuck on launch
androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:title: Start media app twice

androidx.preference.SeekBarPreference.android:title: Delay (seconds) before start of media app

androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable Automate Service on service start
androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:title: Enable Automate

EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage: Paste flow URI you can find in 'flow beginning block' of your Automate Flow
EditTextPreference.android:title: Start Automate Flow

androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:summary: Disable navi start activity of MainUI to avoid screen flickering
androidx.preference.SwitchPreference.android:title: Disable navi start activity
